creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed, with minor ommission.

Note: I prefer to leave/set USES=python:<version-spec> exactly as upstream declares it in setup.py (ideally exactly in python_requires, if set), at least in my ports, but also recommend it to others, as declarative > imperative when it comes to packaging as much as possible. If/when we extend our syntax to support more complex versions, this will ease automatic creation/validation of python ports with regard to version support, leaving most of the work to upstreams to declare it properly/accurately.

Thanks for the update, and apologies for the delay :)
